citations.narrative:
Three bags of dog food (not yet in use) were stored on the floor inside the same room as animal housing. Improper
storage of food (on the floor, by animals) increases risk of contamination of the food. Ensure that unopened food and
bedding is stored off the floor and away from walls and not in the same space as animals as required.
***Item was corrected prior to report delivery. Ensure to maintain correct from 3/2/26 forward.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

Three bags of dog food (not yet in use) were stored on the floor inside the same room as animal housing. Improper 
storage of food (on the floor, by animals) increases risk of contamination of the food. Ensure that unopened food and 
bedding is stored off the floor and away from walls and not in the same space as animals as required.
